mappings.rationale: This element is simple text and should remain lightweight.

propsContract.classContract: Eyebrow typography and accent color are applied via token-aware classes

forbiddenSubstitutions: Do not convert this element into a badge or pill unless the design explicitly requires it

mappings.rationale: The headline must remain semantic and visually controlled; a generic title component is too risky.

propsContract.classContract: Display typography, max-width, and balanced line-height are applied directly

forbiddenSubstitutions: Do not map to a shared section heading component if it weakens headline scale or spacing

mappings.rationale: The supporting copy needs custom width and rhythm, but not a dedicated shared component.

propsContract.classContract: Body large typography and readable line length are applied at the section level

forbiddenSubstitutions: Do not fall back to the repo's default paragraph style if it compresses line-height or width

mappings.rationale: The repo button can be reused only if size, radius, weight, and states can match the spec.
wrappers: Place inside a CTA row that preserves primary-first ordering and spacing
forbiddenSubstitutions: Do not use the default button variant if it loses prominence, padding, or shadow treatment

mappings.rationale: This action should remain clearly secondary while aligning with the CTA row.
wrappers: Keep in the same CTA cluster as the primary CTA
allowedSubstitutions: A lightweight button style is allowed only if it stays visually subordinate to the primary CTA
forbiddenSubstitutions: Do not give it equal fill, radius, or weight to the primary CTA

mappings.rationale: The proof row is content-specific and should stay quiet and flexible.

propsContract.layoutContract: Vertical stack on small screens, horizontal scan row on desktop

forbiddenSubstitutions: Do not replace with a loud logo wall or testimonial carousel

repoGaps.gap: Display typography utility may not exist in the target repo
repoGaps.workaround: Implement local hero-specific typography styles and document the missing design-system primitive
